content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Cybersecurity and Firewalls

This detailed secondary tutorial is engineered to cover the complete syllabus for JSS 3 / Year 9 Computer Science in the Third Term. We explore critical formulas, diagrams, properties, and step-by-step applications.
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.

content.question: Which of the following is true regarding Cybersecurity and Firewalls?
options: It is a core secondary concept
It is only an elective study
content.explanation: Cybersecurity and Firewalls is a core academic pillar within the standard Junior Secondary syllabus.
